title: Progress
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Progress wrapper using local Base UI Progress behavior and cn.

registry.reason: shadcn Progress composes the local Base UI Progress primitive.
shadcn Progress uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper.
Provides Effect Schema options for the wrapper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit primitive.
React state and effects are origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
The controlled origin example uses Slider interaction; the Foldkit parity example renders deterministic static state.
Origin language selector runtime dependency is replaced by local Arabic example constants and origin fixture aliases.

examples.title: ProgressControlled
examples.description: Controlled progress rendered with deterministic static state.

examples.title: ProgressDemo
examples.description: Default Progress demo at the captured initial value.

examples.title: ProgressWithLabel
examples.description: Progress with visible label and formatted value.

examples.title: ProgressRtl
examples.description: RTL Progress layout example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Controlled Progress example renders a deterministic static value instead of live React timer or Slider interaction.
deviations.rationale: The registry example is a rendered parity fixture. Static progress state preserves the relevant DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without introducing timer or Slider behavior.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
